response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the final chorus and outro section of the 'Mogu Mogu Yummy!' reference lyrics provided in the JSON. The JSON contains the full song, but this specific video segment only covers the concluding lines. I have discarded the unused lyrics from the earlier verses. Timestamps are strictly synchronized with the puppet's vocalizations, ensuring the subtitles disappear during the instrumental fade-out at the end of the clip.

subtitles.original: もぐもぐ もぐもぐ
もぐもぐやみぃ マジ神
やむやむ ありのまんま
subtitles.english: Yamu Yamu, just the way it is

subtitles.original: もぐもぐやみぃ Magic Coming
この世を味わうんだ うまうま
subtitles.english: I'm going to taste this world, delicious
